procedure.name: FeedSaveMessage
FeedToArchiveRecipient
FeedToArchive
FeedSetAsRead
FeedSetAsReadAll
FeedLoad
FeedFavoriteLoad
FeedLoadNew
FeedFavoriteLoadNew
FeedInfoLoadNew
FeedMessageLoad
FeedParentMessageLoad
FeedSearch
FeedFavoritsSearch
FeedArchiveSearch
FeedCommentsLoad
FeedGetUnreadCount
FeedGetNewIds
FeedChangeDateHashFirst
FeedChangeDateHashLast
FeedSetAsReadForObject
FeedGetReadedPostsIds

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: select * from FeedGetReadedPostsIds (:Recipient, cast(:IsRead as smallint), :FromDate)

procedure.name: FeedLoadMessages

hibernate-mapping.sql-query: update &&Feed&& set &&ChangeDateHash&& = substring(&&ChangeDateHash&& from 1 for 16) || substring('0000000000000000000' || cast(&&Id&& as varchar(19)) from 1 + char_length(cast(&&Id&& as varchar(19))) for 19) where &&IsParent&& = 1 and &&ChildCount&& > 0

procedure.name: FeedChildCountRecalc
